documentationHazards.requiredMarker: Open the durable gate with the reviewed ticket:
documentationHazards.risk: The guide still instructs operators to OPEN the legacy telegram_send gate and call /send, conflicting with B10.1 quarantine.
documentationHazards.requiredRemediation: Replace the live procedure with the shared 503 refusal, migration-0007 prerequisites, and ticketed post-kernel canary workflow.
